## Checklist

- [ ] Rename incorrect or misspelled fields in model files
- [ ] Search entire project for old references and update them
- [ ] Verify loading / state UI handles success, error, and empty states
- [ ] Ensure API response mapping matches updated model fields
- [ ] Check null / optional handling for failed responses
- [ ] Test loading state UI behavior
- [ ] Test error state UI behavior
- [ ] Test empty state UI behavior
- [ ] Run app and verify no crashes on navigation
- [ ] Confirm build succeeds on both debug and release

Optional but Recommended:

- [ ] Add logging for failure states
- [ ] Add unit tests for model parsing
- [ ] Review naming consistency across project
